global.description: The ad features a vibrant orange background with a clear focus on travel offers.

elements.label: Orange gradient background
elements.description: A smooth orange gradient background that fills the entire canvas.

elements.label: Main headline text
elements.description: Bold, white text reading 'Dream destinations await' prominently displayed at the top.

elements.label: Supporting text
elements.description: Smaller white text below the headline stating 'Special fares today'.

elements.label: Price display
elements.description: A bold, eye-catching '$4.99' in white, positioned centrally.

elements.label: Call to action button
elements.description: A prominent button with the text 'Claim reward' in white, located at the bottom.

elements.label: Brand logo
elements.description: The logo 'CloudRoute' displayed at the top left in a contrasting color.

elements.label: Sale badge
elements.description: A small, bright yellow badge with the word 'SALE' in bold text at the top right.

elements.description: Two overlapping geometric shapes in a lighter shade of orange, adding visual interest.
